# CWE-1220 positive: coarse role gate on all records (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-1220-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-1220: Insufficient Granularity of Access Control.
// Vulnerable: any authenticated user may read any invoice by numeric id.

import (
	"database/sql"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

type InvoicePure struct {
	ID     int     `json:"id"`
	Owner  int     `json:"owner_id"`
	Amount float64 `json:"amount"`
}

func GetInvoicePure(db *sql.DB) http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		if r.Header.Get("Authorization") == "" {
			http.Error(w, "login required", http.StatusUnauthorized)
			return
		}
		id := r.URL.Query().Get("id")
		var inv InvoicePure
		err := db.QueryRow(
			"SELECT id, owner_id, amount FROM invoices WHERE id = $1", id,
		).Scan(&inv.ID, &inv.Owner, &inv.Amount)
		if err != nil {
			http.Error(w, "not found", http.StatusNotFound)
			return
		}
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
		json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(inv)
	}
}
